scripts.build: npm run build -w @ponder/shared && npm run build -w @ponder/api && npm run build -w @ponder/web
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build -w @ponder/shared && npm run build -w @ponder/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ponder/shared && npm run typecheck -w @ponder/api && npm run typecheck -w @ponder/web
